FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Tween

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The typed computed-"TemplateSettings" convention — the antidote to WinUI's stringly TemplateSettings bound into storyboards. A control declares a local readonly record struct <Control>TemplateSettings(...) of typed values (rotations, heights, clip rects, open/close animation positions), computes it ONCE per state change (a pure factory called in render, or a UseMemo/OnRealized effect that reads the control's own signals), and feeds the fields into the engine's existing channels: static props, TransformBind/OpacityBind/WidthBind/ HeightBind, AnimEngine keyframe seeds, or the clip-rect channel (AnimChannel.ClipL/T/R/B). Never rebuild the record inside a hot bind/effect body — compute it in the memo/factory. ExpanderTemplateSettings is the reference; the same shape serves CommandBarFlyout, NavigationView, Progress*, TeachingTip, TabView, TreeView, … These small helpers are the shared interpolation math those records use.

public static class Tween

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
